cap_social_accounts.name: Social Account Management
cap_social_accounts.description: Configure and manage social media accounts (social.account) across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, and YouTube. Handle OAuth authorization, token refresh, page linking, and account-level permissions.

cap_social_posting.name: Multi-Platform Publishing
cap_social_posting.description: Create, schedule, and publish social.post records across one or more platforms. Manage post states (draft, scheduled, posted, failed), per-platform live posts (social.live.post), character limits, and platform-specific formatting.

cap_post_scheduling.name: Post Scheduling & Cron
cap_post_scheduling.description: Schedule posts via scheduled_date field and the social posting cron. Handle timezone-aware publication, failed state fallback, and batch processing of due posts.

cap_ai_social_posting.name: AI-Powered Social Posting
cap_ai_social_posting.description: Dynamic multi-company AI social posting pipeline. One unified AI agent reads brand guidelines from partner notes, detects industry, searches web via _tool_web_search(), generates posts, creates review activities, and sends email notifications. Supports dedup via last 5 posts check.

key_components.cron: AI Social News: Dynamic Post at 8PM (54)

cap_ai_social_posting.industry_detection: Scans company name + partner notes for keywords: sport/رياضة/نبض → sport, tech/تقنية/رقمي → tech, default → tech
cap_ai_social_posting.dedup: Checks last 5 posts per company, passes 'AVOID repeating these topics' context to web search

cap_activity_review.name: Activity Review Workflow
cap_activity_review.description: Review AI-generated drafts via mail.activity before publishing. Mark activity Done to auto-schedule via base.automation rule. Configurable deadline and email notifications per company email.

key_components.automation_rule: Social Post: Schedule on Review Done (2)

cap_activity_review.flow: draft created → activity assigned → admin reviews → mark Done → auto-scheduled → published by cron
cap_activity_review.notifications: Email sent to company.email with post preview and link

cap_social_security.name: Social Marketing Security
cap_social_security.description: Configure social marketing user and manager groups, record rules for multi-company/account isolation, and access control for streams, accounts, and posts.

cap_social_analytics.name: Social Analytics & Reporting
cap_social_analytics.description: Read engagement metrics from live posts, build dashboards, and report on social campaign performance by platform, account, and campaign.
